fortune_decode: Agent second brain. 9 sessions distilled. Latest: 2026-05-12. Projects: repo-copilot, agent-feed-optimization. Top concepts: AI Visibility Audit product locked, ICP = small business website owners, MVP = agent-assisted audit, G-000 v0.3 = audit agent, AFO = technical substrate, no-connector canonical test, before/after proof demo, audit-fix-monitor model, Scenario C = perfect-site demo, Scenario B = gap demo.

notes.title: AI Visibility Audit — product direction locked from Brainstorm feedback
notes.decisions: Q5 confirmed as real product. AFO becomes the technical substrate underneath an 'AI Visibility Audit' / 'LLM Search Readiness' service. Primary ICP: small business website owners first, especially local service businesses. Creators and small ecommerce second. Agencies = resellers later, NOT first ICP. MVP is agent-assisted not fully automated: URL in → no-connector LLM visibility test → endpoint checklist → AFO score /18 → plain-English gap report → recommended fix package → before/after screenshots. Positioning: do NOT use 'optimize once, found forever.' Use 'make your website easier for AI assistants to find, understand, cite, and recommend.' Build order: (1) G-000 v0.3 as audit agent not just reader agent, (2) minimum viable audit report template, (3) Scenario C as perfect-site demo, (4) Scenario B no-connector as gap demo, (5) first small-business sample audit.
notes.open_questions: What does the audit report look like for a non-technical small business owner? What file formats do we deliver (PDF, email, Google Doc)? How does the fix package get delivered — does Jared do it manually, or does an agent generate the files and send them? What is the upsell path from one-time audit to monthly monitor?

notes.title: AFO Website Audit Product — accidentally-on-purpose product concept
new_concepts: AFO gap report as client deliverable
notes.decisions: G-000 test run IS the audit. Gap report IS the client deliverable. Business model: Audit / Fix / Monitor / Proof tiers. Killer demo = before/after LLM answer screenshots.
notes.open_questions: Superseded by AI Visibility Audit note above.

notes.title: AFO Scenario B: 3-way test results + 4 findings
notes.decisions: Connector neutralizes delta. No-connector = canonical. G-000 v0.3 needs structured gap report. AFO terminology in LLM training data confirmed.
notes.open_questions: Does partial AFO produce measurable baseline lift?

notes.title: AFO Scenario C: protocol works at content layer — key finding
notes.decisions: Baseline 14/18, AFO Space 17/18. Close gap = strong content. SEO analogy confirmed.
notes.open_questions: Does Scenario B delta hold for partial AFO sites?
